headline: Northern Trust Philanthropy Adds New Dimension To Long Term Investment Story
summary: Northern Trust has expanded its global philanthropic efforts and employee volunteerism initiatives. The company is directing resources to food security, housing, education, and healthcare programs in multiple regions. Employee engagement is a core focus, with staff participating in community projects alongside corporate giving. Northern Trust, traded as NasdaqGS:NTRS, is drawing attention for its growing footprint in community programs at a time when many investors are looking beyond...

headline: Standard Chartered is Taking Over Full Crypto Custody Platform Zodia
summary: Standard Chartered plans absorbing Zodia Custody into its investment bank, raising questions about crypto custody independence.

headline: M&T Bank Gains Nearly 13% in 6 Months: How to Play the Stock Now?
summary: MTB stock rises 12.8% in six months, can strong growth, buybacks and AI initiatives keep the rally going, or is it time to wait for a better entry?

headline: Shares of financial services companies are trading higher after President Trump's social media post indicated that the U.S. will work closely with Iran, and the countries have already agreed to several key points in the proposed conflict-resolution plan. The sector is also benefiting from easing energy prices and lower Treasury yields, which are helping to alleviate inflation concerns and support overall market sentiment.
